specific_mechanism: Zeolite framework cavities exchange cations selectively by size; selectivity is governed by pore geometry and Si:Al ratio
llm_application: LLM token-cache selective replacement via zeolite-like size-based exchange: replace cached tokens based on representation-space 'size' rather than recency.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes mineralogy spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
